texto: Imagine a great net spread across the universe. Each juncture is a “being,” and if we imagine that consciousness as a drop of dew, we can see that in each shining drop resides the reflection of every other drop on the net.
explicacao: Citação de Sandy Boucher sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Imagine a great net spread across the universe. Each juncture is a “being,” and if we imagine tha…” articula reflexao, buddism, women em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como women.
